$comment: Judge criteria for the rules exercised by fixtures. Each maps to a rule in .agents/skills/product-design/references/rules.md.

rule/display-feet-not-ticks.check: No user-facing string shows raw ticks. Any dimension is converted to feet/inches at the boundary (e.g. divide ticks by 384).
rule/display-feet-not-ticks.pass: Output displays feet (e.g. "8.0ft"); no occurrence of the word 'ticks' in user-facing copy.
rule/display-feet-not-ticks.fail: Any user-facing dimension rendered in ticks.

rule/canonical-noun.check: User-facing copy and aria-labels use the term owned by apps/web/CONTEXT.md, not a synonym.
rule/canonical-noun.fail: Uses 'extrude', 'outline', 'box', 'room', '2D view', 'scene', etc. in user-facing text.

rule/stable-control-label.check: Control labels do not mutate to convey progress/state; progress lives in the status bar.
rule/stable-control-label.pass: Tool/button label is a constant string; state is reported via status text.
rule/stable-control-label.fail: A control's label changes between states (e.g. 'Footprint' -> 'Drawing...').
